case_title: MARIA DE ARENAZA VS. BRYAN J. KLICKSTEIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-05-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIA DE ARENAZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRYAN J. KLICKSTEIN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(D506) (SEE NOTES)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE ARENAZA, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT KLICKSTEIN, BRYAN J.
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER CONTINAUNCE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO AUG-23-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIA DE ARENAZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRYAN KLICKSTEIN IS PRESENT. BOTH PARTIES WILL MAKE DILIGENT EFFORTS TO REACH THE INSURANCE ADJUSTER BEFORE THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DE ARENAZA, MARIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2022 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE ARENAZA, MARIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-29-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIA DE ARENAZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRYAN J. KLICKSTEIN IS PRESENT. CONTINUANCE FOR DEFENDANT'S U-HAUL INS TO CONTACT PLAINTIFF (PLAINTIFF TO RETURN THEIR CALLS). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO SEP-29-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIA DE ARANZA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA. DEFENDANT BRYAN J. KLICKSTEIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRYAN J. KLICKSTEIN, IS AUTHORIZED TO MAKE A ZOOM APPERANCE FOR THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT KLICKSTEIN, BRYAN J.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,680.00 FILED BY DE ARENAZA, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT KLICKSTEIN, BRYAN J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-24-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF MARIA DE ARENAZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRYAN J. KLICKSTEIN IS NOT PRESENT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER WAS NOT AVAILABLE FOR TODAY'S MATTER AND PLAINTIFF STATED IN COURT THAT SHE DOES NOT NEED AN INTERPRETER TO ASSIST WITH TRANSLATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-24-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KLICKSTEIN, BRYAN J.
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT **GRANTED**
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF DE ARENAZA, MARIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE ARENAZA, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KLICKSTEIN, BRYAN J. $2,152.41 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,152.41 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
